text: HTML table with w-full or min-w-full distributes leftover space proportionally across ALL columns using auto layout, creating visible whitespace gaps inside columns even when w-px is set on <th> elements (td min-w overrides th width). The fix is to remove all width classes from <table> entirely, letting it size to content. The overflow-x-auto wrapper handles scrolling. Setting w-px on <th> is ineffective when <td> cells have min-w constraints.
issue: Empty whitespace gap visible between Project/customer and Product/region columns in dashboard table
